touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Nora Becker (VP of CS) at PhotonCollective expressing interest in improving sales-to-CS handoff process. Brief initial contact to schedule discovery call.

questions_asked.question: Do you have a solution that helps automate handoffs between sales and customer success teams?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, our platform specializes in sales-to-CS handoff automation with unlimited automation capabilities

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to understand current handoff challenges

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email confirming discovery call details. Shared agenda focused on understanding PhotonCollective's current sales-to-CS transition pain points and process gaps.
next_steps: Review current handoff documentation if available

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Nora revealed significant handoff friction causing customer confusion and CS team inefficiency. Currently using basic Salesforce workflows. Team of 100, looking to support 7 CS managers. Mentioned evaluating Gong as well.

questions_asked.question: What's the biggest pain point in your current sales-to-CS handoff?
questions_asked.answer: Account context gets lost in transition - CS has to re-ask questions customers already answered in sales calls

questions_asked.question: How are you currently managing handoffs?
questions_asked.answer: Mostly manual Salesforce notes and occasional Slack messages, very inconsistent

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing Salesforce and Slack setup?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both and can pull conversation context automatically

next_steps: Schedule product demo focused on handoff automation
Prepare custom demo using PhotonCollective's workflow

touches.ai_summary: Post-discovery follow-up email summarizing key challenges discussed and confirming demo agenda. Highlighted unlimited automation tier as good fit for their workflow complexity.

questions_asked.question: Will the demo show how conversation intelligence from sales calls carries over to CS?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - we'll demonstrate live how call summaries and key topics flow into CS playbooks

touches.ai_summary: Detailed product demo showcasing handoff automation, conversation intelligence, and workflow triggers. Nora engaged positively with unlimited automation features. Discussed 7-seat deployment for CS leadership team. She mentioned Gong is also in consideration but focused more on call recording than handoff.

questions_asked.question: How does this differ from Gong's approach to sales-CS alignment?
questions_asked.answer: Gong excels at call recording and analytics, but our platform is purpose-built for handoff orchestration with automated playbook triggers

questions_asked.question: Beyond the 7 CS managers, are there other stakeholders who should see this?
questions_asked.answer: The CS team will be primary users, though I'll need to loop in our COO eventually for budget approval

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks for technical setup, then 1-2 weeks for team onboarding

objections: Need to ensure this doesn't create duplicate work with our existing Salesforce workflows
next_steps: Prepare pricing proposal for 7 seats with unlimited automation

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call reviewing $7,500 list price for 7 seats on unlimited automation tier. Nora expressed budget constraints and requested discount. Discussed ROI from reducing CS onboarding time and customer confusion. She indicated decision timeline is tight.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing? Our budget was closer to $5,000 annually.
questions_asked.answer: Let me see what we can do - given you're coming in through inbound and clear use case fit, I can work with leadership on adjusted pricing

questions_asked.question: Should we schedule time with your COO to review business case and get buy-in?
questions_asked.answer: I'd like to get pricing finalized first, then I can present internally

questions_asked.question: What does implementation support look like?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated CSM for onboarding, technical setup assistance, and 30-day check-ins

objections: Need to move quickly but cautious about adding another tool
next_steps: Get approval for discounted pricing at $5,200 ACV

touches.ai_summary: Brief executive alignment call with Nora to discuss business case. COO was invited but did not attend - Nora indicated she has discretionary approval up to $10K. Reviewed revised pricing at $5,200 (30% discount). Discussed contract terms and start date preferences.

questions_asked.question: Will the COO need to review the agreement before signature?
questions_asked.answer: No, this falls within my approval authority, I can sign directly

questions_asked.question: Is the $5,200 pricing locked for multi-year or just year one?
questions_asked.answer: That rate holds for the initial contract term with standard annual escalation afterward

next_steps: Schedule negotiation call to review MSA

touches.ai_summary: Contract negotiation call to review MSA and finalize terms. Discussed payment terms, annual vs quarterly billing, renewal clauses, and data security requirements. Nora confirmed $5,200 ACV pricing acceptable and requested net-30 payment terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we do net-30 payment terms instead of upfront annual?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can accommodate net-30 for the discounted annual amount

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention and privacy policy for call recordings?
questions_asked.answer: All data encrypted at rest and in transit, retained per your specification, SOC 2 Type II compliant

questions_asked.question: Are there any other stakeholders who need to review the contract?
questions_asked.answer: I'll have our legal do a quick pass but no major concerns anticipated

objections: Standard payment terms don't align with our AP process
next_steps: Send final MSA with net-30 terms
Target signature by end of week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with finalized contract incorporating net-30 payment terms and requested MSA edits. Confirmed $5,200 ACV for 7 seats on unlimited automation tier. Awaiting legal review and signature from Nora.
